Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Bleeding Phoenix]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a Dreadgod currently within range.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — The Bleeding Phoenix rests hundreds of miles to the south beneath a city of tattered cloth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — The Bleeding Phoenix offers mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a fragment sought out by the Dreadgod cult.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is an entity that can be alerted by a breach in a seal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — The rise of the Bleeding Phoenix has closed Arelius branches in the south.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — The Bleeding Phoenix spread its wings like a wound stretching from one horizon to another.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — The Bleeding Phoenix was awakened by power in the same labyrinth as the Ancestor's Spear and hunger madra binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a massive event or entity that was not predicted until weeks before it happened.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — The Bleeding Phoenix's consciousness is scattered over thousands of pieces.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — The passage of the Bleeding Phoenix left buildings in the town half-destroyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — The passage of the Bleeding Phoenix caused a disturbance around the facility.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a Dreadgod that recently awoke.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — The Bleeding Phoenix caused devastation to the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — One dream tablet comes from a researcher who examined the Bleeding Phoenix directly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is beginning to go dormant.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a crimson bird with wings spread.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — The Bleeding Phoenix covered the sky from horizon to horizon.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a cult founded by the Blood Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a Dreadgod that can take up an entire horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Blood Sage has no influence over the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Shadow brings stolen power back to the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a symbol on Redmoon Hall's cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a group or lineage mentioned by the Sage of Red Faith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Reigan Shen may exterminate the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a group that exerts influence.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The Bleeding Phoenix was a rampage that Lindon and Yerin lived through.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The Bleeding Phoenix enhanced blood aura to make the sky blaze red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Bleeding Phoenix was witnessed in the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is an entity that Akura Malice was able to keep away from certain areas for a few days.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Eithan performed experiments on the Bleeding Phoenix in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Akura Malice had previously faced the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The arrival of the Bleeding Phoenix scared away people attempting to leave through Heaven’s Glory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a location Yerin might have tossed herself to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is flying into the Trackless Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — The Bleeding Phoenix has exhibited behavioral deviation and is acting according to an unknown purpose.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a Dreadgod with an oozing red body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is an event that Akura Malice has not seen hints of rising.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — The ghouls are compared to the bloodspawn of the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — The creature in the chamber above had a sense of hunger, corruption, and death like the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — The tanks gave off an impression similar to the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — The bone ring once gave birth to the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a Dreadgod that can call a rain of red lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Bleeding Phoenix's awareness is scattered, feeling like a council in its head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is made of blood and madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Bleeding Phoenix can dissolve its body into droplets that act as eggs through spatial distortion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — The Bleeding Phoenix gave a keening cry and fled.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a Dreadgod flying east through the Trackless Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Bleeding Phoenix's aura stains the world with crimson stripes across the clouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is associated with horror stories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is flying for Iceflower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — The Bleeding Phoenix has an entire continent to itself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is composed of blood and hunger aspects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — The Bleeding Phoenix appears to be bleeding because it keeps other aspects in semi-gelatinous spheres.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is an entity that Redmoon has been in contact with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — The Bleeding Phoenix can use its song to exert pressure on others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Bleeding Phoenix produces a tiny phoenix avatar from blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Bleeding Phoenix's avatar has a liquid beak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Sage of Red Faith unleashes everything into the Bleeding Phoenix.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin denied the will of the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is a source of madra inside Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — The Monarchs are responsible for the Bleeding Phoenix staying alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — The Bleeding Phoenix has a song.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — The Bleeding Phoenix would be a perfect weapon for Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — The Bleeding Phoenix is taking Emriss Silentborn's people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — The Bleeding Phoenix's eggs have merged with trees, animals, sacred beasts, and humans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — The Bleeding Phoenix can take the form of a human woman with bright red hair and scarlet wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — The Bleeding Phoenix might take care of Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Bleeding Phoenix sends ten thousand needles at Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — The Bleeding Phoenix uses a barrage of Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — The battle between Dreadgods can be felt by everyone in the world with sufficient advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — The Bleeding Phoenix's power is sensed like a crimson bonfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The battle against the Bleeding Phoenix tilted toward Lindon after Shen was gone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The Bleeding Phoenix retaliated against the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 34''' — The core binding of the Bleeding Phoenix resembles a sealed egg.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — The cloak of the Bleeding Phoenix swallowed Li Markuth's sword.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — The cult of the Bleeding Phoenix is protected by Yerin Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The cloak of the Bleeding Phoenix billowed from Lindon's shoulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Bleeding Phoenix rose after a few days.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
